clinical_note: Endocrinology prior-auth request for semaglutide (Ozempic). Patient: Emery Fox, age 56. Diagnosis: type 2 diabetes mellitus (E11.9). Diabetes duration: 4 years. Metformin trial: 6 months at max tolerated dose. BMI: 30.2. Requesting Ozempic for glycemic control.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires a documented type 2 diabetes diagnosis, most recent A1C of at least 7.0%, metformin trial of at least 3 months at tolerated dose, and BMI recorded in the chart.
